creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
> John Merryweather Cooper:

> # portupgrade -fR x11-drivers/xf86-video-nv
>
> worked for me.

you're right!  worrying about the sudden loss of pciconf(8)
functionality, i remade world before using your suggested command.  in
my previous attempt i didn't think of using `-R' to also rebuild
everything "x11-drivers/xf86-video-nv" needs.

please close this PR, thanks.


regards, clemens
